subject: A haunted forest interior where ornate arched windows and grave-marker frames are embedded into the trunks of gnarled trees; a central tree bleeds a torrent of red sap or lilies into the foreground
description: A dense, shadowed forest interior rendered in saturated reds, oranges, and deep blacks. Massive twisted tree trunks dominate the scene; embedded into their bark are ornate arched window frames and grave-marker-style stone surrounds, several glowing with cold pale-white light that cuts against the surrounding fire-hued ambience. From the base of the central tree a thick cascade of blood-red liquid or lily-petal mass pours downward into the foreground, framed by jagged thorny silhouettes. Smaller upright slab shapes are visible mid-ground, reading as gravestones or tombstone fragments scattered through the underbrush. The sky between the trunks burns in lurid orange tones with no visible sun, giving the impression of perpetual dusk or distant fire. No figures are depicted.
foreground: central tree trunk bleeding a red cascade of liquid or lilies, jagged thorny silhouettes at the base
background: burning orange sky between gnarled tree trunks with embedded glowing windows and gravestones
